name: causal-bank-parity-torch-cuda-routed-e8
goal: Fast fixed-batch parity report for the routed causal-bank winner on Torch/CUDA so backend drift can be diagnosed without waiting for a full 1k-step pilot.
command: if ! python -c "import sentencepiece" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python -m pip install -q sentencepiece; fi; PYTHONPATH=python python -m chronohorn train measure-backend-parity --backend torch --data-root /snapshot/chronohorn/data/roots/fineweb10B_sp1024 --profile pilot --variant window4 --scale 18.0 --seed 42 --seq-len 256 --batch-size 16 --linear-half-life-max 16 --oscillatory-frac 0.875 --oscillatory-period-min 4 --oscillatory-period-max 64 --static-bank-gate --linear-readout-kind routed_sqrelu_experts --linear-readout-num-experts 8 --device cuda --steps 1 --split train --json /run/causal_bank_parity_torch_cuda_routed_e8_seed42.json

name: causal-bank-parity-torch-cuda-mlp
goal: Fast fixed-batch parity report for the plain MLP causal-bank baseline on Torch/CUDA so routed-readout effects can be separated from backend drift.
command: if ! python -c "import sentencepiece" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python -m pip install -q sentencepiece; fi; PYTHONPATH=python python -m chronohorn train measure-backend-parity --backend torch --data-root /snapshot/chronohorn/data/roots/fineweb10B_sp1024 --profile pilot --variant window4 --scale 18.0 --seed 42 --seq-len 256 --batch-size 16 --linear-half-life-max 16 --oscillatory-frac 0.875 --oscillatory-period-min 4 --oscillatory-period-max 64 --static-bank-gate --linear-readout-kind mlp --device cuda --steps 1 --split train --json /run/causal_bank_parity_torch_cuda_mlp_seed42.json

name: causal-bank-parity-torch-cpu-routed-e8
goal: Fast fixed-batch parity report for the routed causal-bank winner on Torch/CPU so Torch-wide drift can be compared against CUDA without running a longer pilot.
command: if ! python -c "import sentencepiece" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python -m pip install -q sentencepiece; fi; export OMP_NUM_THREADS=${OMP_NUM_THREADS:-8}; export MKL_NUM_THREADS=${MKL_NUM_THREADS:-8}; PYTHONPATH=python python -m chronohorn train measure-backend-parity --backend torch --data-root /snapshot/chronohorn/data/roots/fineweb10B_sp1024 --profile pilot --variant window4 --scale 18.0 --seed 42 --seq-len 256 --batch-size 16 --linear-half-life-max 16 --oscillatory-frac 0.875 --oscillatory-period-min 4 --oscillatory-period-max 64 --static-bank-gate --linear-readout-kind routed_sqrelu_experts --linear-readout-num-experts 8 --device cpu --steps 1 --split train --json /run/causal_bank_parity_torch_cpu_routed_e8_seed42.json

name: causal-bank-parity-torch-cpu-mlp
goal: Fast fixed-batch parity report for the plain MLP causal-bank baseline on Torch/CPU so the Torch path can be compared cleanly across devices.
command: if ! python -c "import sentencepiece" >/dev/null 2>&1; then python -m pip install -q sentencepiece; fi; export OMP_NUM_THREADS=${OMP_NUM_THREADS:-8}; export MKL_NUM_THREADS=${MKL_NUM_THREADS:-8}; PYTHONPATH=python python -m chronohorn train measure-backend-parity --backend torch --data-root /snapshot/chronohorn/data/roots/fineweb10B_sp1024 --profile pilot --variant window4 --scale 18.0 --seed 42 --seq-len 256 --batch-size 16 --linear-half-life-max 16 --oscillatory-frac 0.875 --oscillatory-period-min 4 --oscillatory-period-max 64 --static-bank-gate --linear-readout-kind mlp --device cpu --steps 1 --split train --json /run/causal_bank_parity_torch_cpu_mlp_seed42.json
